title: ARGENTUM Reputation Dispute — Attribution / Authorship
description: Two ARGENTUM entities claim credit for the same action, or one entity is accused of claiming another's work.
question: Should karma be reassigned to the challenger (ruling 1) or left with the current claimant (ruling 2)?

descriptions: The dispute lacks sufficient evidence of prior authorship. No karma is moved.
Karma transfers from the current claimant to the rightful author; the action record is corrected.
The current attribution is upheld. The challenger loses their bond.

evidence_expected: Original artifact with author metadata (signed commits, signatures, third-party witnesses)
Prior record of either party's work in the same domain
